chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Bail A. No. S — 1213 of 2022. Cr. Bail A. No. S — 1055 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 06.01.2023. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Sanaullah Khoso Advocate for the applicants. Applicants / accused in Cr. B.A. No.1213 of 2022 are present. Complainant Sultan Khan along with injured Mst. Rani present in person. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon A.P.G. Sindh. -------- Both these bail applications arise from the same crime, therefore, will dispose of together by this single order. Brief facts of the prosecution case as disclosed in the FIR are that there was dispute between the parties over rent of the house. On 04.09.2022, the applicants/accused along with others duly armed with pistol, hammer, iron rod and hatchet attacked upon the complainant party, inflicted injuries upon complainant and his mother Mst. Rani, as such, they were booked in the instant case. Heard the learned counsel and perused the record. From the record it appears that applicants/accused Jawaid Ali alias Jawaid and Muhammad Shahzad alias Shahzad in Criminal Application No.S- 1213 of 2022, have already been admitted to ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 10.11.2022, whereas applicant/accused Sharif filed Criminal Bail Application No.S-1055 of 2022, for grant of post arrest bail. Learned counsel for the complainant at the outset submits that matter has been compromised between the parties, as such, his client has no objection in the event if the bail is granted to applicant Sharif and the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused Jawaid Ali alias Jawaid and Muhammad Shahzad alias Shahzad in criminal bail application No.S-1213 of 2022, vide order dated 10.11.2022, is confirmed.

From the record it appears that applicants/accused Jawaid Ali alias Jawaid and Muhammad Shahzad alias Shahzad in Criminal Application No.S- 1213 of 2022, have already been admitted to ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 10.11.2022, whereas applicant/accused Sharif filed Criminal Bail Application No.S-1055 of 2022, for grant of post arrest bail. Learned counsel for the complainant at the outset submits that matter has been compromised between the parties, as such, his client has no objection in the event if the bail is granted to applicant Sharif and the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused Jawaid Ali alias Jawaid and Muhammad Shahzad alias Shahzad in criminal bail application No.S-1213 of 2022, vide order dated 10.11.2022, is confirmed. In this regard complainant and injured have also filed their affidavit reiterating the above submission of the learned counsel. Learned A.P.G. Sindh also extends his no objection stating that the offences alleged against the applicants are bailable. Under the circumstances discussed above, the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused namely Jawaid Ali alias Jawaid and Muhammad Shahzad alias Shahzad in Criminal Bail Application No.S-1213 of 2022, vide order dated 10.11.2022, is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Whereas, the bail application No. S-1055 of 2022, is allowed and the applicant/accused Sharif is granted bail subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- [Thirty Thousand] and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court. These applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE A.
